title: Check-in Counter
scene: 你到达机场，准备办理登机手续。

turns.cn: 您好，请出示护照和机票。
turns.en: Good morning. May I see your passport and ticket, please?
Here you go. I'd like a window seat, please.

turns.cn: 好的，12A。您有行李要托运吗？
turns.en: Sure, that's 12A. Do you have any bags to check?
Yes, just one suitcase.

turns.cn: 请把行李放到传送带上。
turns.en: Please place your bag on the conveyor belt.

turns.cn: 这是您的登机牌，登机口是B7。
turns.en: Here's your boarding pass. Your gate is B7.
What time does boarding start?

turns.cn: 下午两点三十分，祝您旅途愉快！
turns.en: Boarding begins at 2:30 PM. Have a great flight!

turns.cn: 请把笔记本电脑从包里拿出来。
turns.en: Please take your laptop out of your bag.
Sure. Do I need to take off my shoes?
Yes, and please remove your jacket as well.
I have a water bottle in my pocket.

turns.cn: 液体不能过安检，请倒掉或扔掉。
turns.en: Liquids aren't allowed. Please empty it or throw it away.
Okay, I'll empty it right now.
Please walk through the scanner.
You're all set. Have a nice trip.

title: Asking for Directions
scene: 你在机场转机，找不到登机口。

turns.cn: 打扰一下，去C12登机口怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to gate C12?

turns.cn: 坐扶梯上到二楼，然后左转。
turns.en: Take the escalator up to the second floor, then turn left.
How long does it take to get there?

turns.cn: 大约十分钟，你的航班几点？
turns.en: About ten minutes. What time is your flight?

turns.cn: 三点起飞，现在两点半了。
turns.en: It departs at three. It's two thirty now.
Then you'd better hurry!
Thanks for your help!
